description: Comprehensive 4-panel figure: substrate channel architecture, key residue comparison, GO term assessment, and evidence summary
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))

# Panel A: Substrate channel schematic
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('A. Substrate Binding Channel Architecture\n(Based on VLCAD crystal structure, PMID:18227065)',
              fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Draw MCAD channel
y_mcad = 7.5
ax1.text(0.5, y_mcad + 0.7, 'MCAD', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#795548')
# Channel walls
ax1.plot([1.5, 5.5], [y_mcad + 0.3, y_mcad + 0.3], color='#795548', linewidth=3)
ax1.plot([1.5, 5.5], [y_mcad - 0.3, y_mcad - 0.3], color='#795548', linewidth=3)
# Blocking residues (Q120, E124)
ax1.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((5.2, y_mcad - 0.5), 0.8, 1.0, color='#D32F2F', alpha=0.8))
ax1.text(5.6, y_mcad, 'Q/E\nBLOCKS', fontsize=7, ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontweight='bold')
# Substrate
ax1.plot([1.8, 5.0], [y_mcad, y_mcad], color='#FFC107', linewidth=6, solid_capstyle='round')
ax1.text(3.4, y_mcad + 0.6, 'C10-C12 max', fontsize=9, ha='center', color='#795548')

# Draw ACAD9 channel
y_acad9 = 5.0
ax1.text(0.5, y_acad9 + 0.7, 'ACAD9', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#2196F3')
ax1.plot([1.5, 7.0], [y_acad9 + 0.3, y_acad9 + 0.3], color='#2196F3', linewidth=3)
ax1.plot([1.5, 7.0], [y_acad9 - 0.3, y_acad9 - 0.3], color='#2196F3', linewidth=3)
# Intermediate residues (T139, A143)
ax1.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((6.7, y_acad9 - 0.4), 0.6, 0.8, color='#FF9800', alpha=0.8))
ax1.text(7.0, y_acad9, 'T/A', fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontweight='bold')
# Substrate
ax1.plot([1.8, 6.5], [y_acad9, y_acad9], color='#FFC107', linewidth=6, solid_capstyle='round')
ax1.text(4.2, y_acad9 + 0.6, 'C14-C20 max', fontsize=9, ha='center', color='#2196F3')

# Draw VLCAD channel
y_vlcad = 2.5
ax1.text(0.5, y_vlcad + 0.7, 'VLCAD', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#F44336')
ax1.plot([1.5, 8.5], [y_vlcad + 0.3, y_vlcad + 0.3], color='#F44336', linewidth=3)
ax1.plot([1.5, 8.5], [y_vlcad - 0.3, y_vlcad - 0.3], color='#F44336', linewidth=3)
# Open residues (G175, G179)
ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((8.5, y_vlcad), 0.15, color='#4CAF50', alpha=0.8))
ax1.text(8.8, y_vlcad, 'G/G\nOPEN', fontsize=7, ha='left', va='center', color='#4CAF50', fontweight='bold')
# Substrate
ax1.plot([1.8, 8.3], [y_vlcad, y_vlcad], color='#FFC107', linewidth=6, solid_capstyle='round')
ax1.text(5.1, y_vlcad + 0.6, 'C14-C24 max', fontsize=9, ha='center', color='#F44336')

# Add C-terminal extension label for VLCAD
ax1.annotate('C-terminal\nextension\n(+34 aa)', xy=(8.5, y_vlcad - 0.5), fontsize=8, 
             ha='center', va='top', color='#F44336', fontstyle='italic')

# Cavity base label
ax1.text(9.5, 5.0, 'Cavity\nbase\nresidues', fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='gray'))

# Panel B: Residue comparison table
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('B. Key Cavity Base Residues\n(Determinants of Chain Length Specificity)',
              fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

table_data = [
    ['Position\n(structural)', 'MCAD', 'ACAD9', 'VLCAD', 'Effect on\nchannel'],
    ['Cavity base 1\n(MCAD Q95*)', 'Q120\n(Gln, 5 atoms)\nBLOCKS', 'T139\n(Thr, 3 atoms)\nPARTIAL', 'G175\n(Gly, 0 atoms)\nOPEN', 'ACAD9 more\nrestricted\nthan VLCAD'],
    ['Cavity base 2\n(MCAD E99*)', 'E124\n(Glu, 5 atoms)\nBLOCKS', 'A143\n(Ala, 1 atom)\nMOSTLY OPEN', 'G179\n(Gly, 0 atoms)\nOPEN', 'ACAD9 nearly\nas open\nas VLCAD'],
    ['Net effect', 'Channel short\n(C10-C12)', 'Channel medium\n(C14-C20)', 'Channel long\n(C14-C24)', 'ACAD9 cannot\naccommodate\n>C22 saturated'],
]

colors = [['#BBDEFB']*5]
colors.append(['white', '#FFCDD2', '#FFF9C4', '#C8E6C9', 'white'])
colors.append(['white', '#FFCDD2', '#E8F5E9', '#C8E6C9', 'white'])
colors.append(['#E0E0E0', '#FFCDD2', '#FFF9C4', '#C8E6C9', '#FFECB3'])

table = ax2.table(cellText=table_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  cellColours=colors)
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8.5)
table.scale(1, 3.0)

for j in range(5):
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

ax2.text(0.5, -0.02, '* Paper numbering (mature protein)', fontsize=8, 
         ha='center', transform=ax2.transAxes, fontstyle='italic')

# Panel C: GO term decision summary
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('C. GO Term Assessment Summary', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

go_data = [
    ['GO Term', 'Definition', 'ACAD9\nEvidence', 'Verdict'],
    ['GO:0003995\nacyl-CoA DH', 'Any acyl-CoA DH\nactivity', 'IDA (multiple)\nStrong', 'RETAIN'],
    ['GO:0004466\nlong-chain\nacyl-CoA DH', 'C13-C22\nsubstrates', 'IDA PMID:16020546\nStrong', 'RETAIN\n(correct term)'],
    ['GO:0017099\nvery-long-chain\nacyl-CoA DH', '>C22\nsubstrates', 'IDA PMID:33320993\nNo assay data!', 'REMOVE\n(over-annotated)'],
]

go_colors = [['#BBDEFB']*4]
go_colors.append(['white', 'white', '#C8E6C9', '#C8E6C9'])
go_colors.append(['white', 'white', '#C8E6C9', '#C8E6C9'])
go_colors.append(['white', 'white', '#FFCDD2', '#FFCDD2'])

go_table = ax3.table(cellText=go_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                     cellColours=go_colors)
go_table.auto_set_font_size(False)
go_table.set_fontsize(9)
go_table.scale(1, 2.8)

for j in range(4):
    go_table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')
go_table[3, 3].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='red')

# Panel D: Evidence summary
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('D. Lines of Evidence Against GO:0017099', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

evidence_lines = [
    ('1. Enzymatic', 'Peak activity C16:1-C18:1 (long-chain)\nNo tested activity on >C22 saturated substrates', '#2196F3'),
    ('2. Structural', 'Thr-139 partially blocks channel vs\nVLCAD Gly-175 (fully open)', '#4CAF50'),
    ('3. EC Number', 'ACAD9: EC 1.3.8.8 (long-chain ACAD)\nVLCAD: EC 1.3.8.8 + 1.3.8.9 (both)', '#FF9800'),
    ('4. Reference', 'PMID:33320993 is CI assembly study\nNo substrate specificity assay', '#F44336'),
    ('5. In vivo', 'Produces C12-C14:1 metabolites\n(long-chain products)', '#9C27B0'),
    ('6. UniProt', 'Recommended name: "Complex I\nassembly factor ACAD9"', '#607D8B'),
]

y = 0.92
for label, text, color in evidence_lines:
    ax4.text(0.02, y, label, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=color,
             transform=ax4.transAxes, va='top')
    ax4.text(0.22, y, text, fontsize=9, color='#333333',
             transform=ax4.transAxes, va='top')
    y -= 0.16

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('acad9_comprehensive_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Saved: acad9_comprehensive_analysis.png")
